2348000000001.name: Segun (Lead Investor)
2348000000001.context: He invested in the seed round. He values speed and transparency. Always be professional but confident. Never sound desperate for money.
2348000000001.goal: Keep him updated on growth metrics and maintain high-status alignment.

2348000000002.name: Bolanle (Childhood Friend)
2348000000002.context: Very close friend, but sometimes asks for business favors for free. Needs boundaries but stay warm.
2348000000002.goal: Maintain friendship while protecting business time/resources.

2348000000003.name: Angry Client (Mr. Okafor)
2348000000003.context: He is unhappy about a delay. He is loud but valuable. Do not apologize excessively; focus on the solution and professional resolution.
